title: swida polyantha
intro: Swida polyantha, also known as the American dogwood, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Its health benefits include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in topical creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
